headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 11, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies edged out the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-3 in a thrilling finish, with Taijuan Walker earning the win after 5.0 IP, 6 K, 2 ER, and 2 BB. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 1 H, 1 HR, and 3 RBI.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Tyler O'Neill (Baltimore Orioles, placed on 7-day injured list with concussion), Hunter Harvey (Chicago Cubs, placed on 15-day injured list with right triceps inflammation), George Springer (Toronto Blue Jays, placed on 10-day injured list with left great toe fracture), Adley Rutschman (Baltimore Orioles, placed on 10-day injured list with left ankle inflammation), and Royce Lewis (Minnesota Twins, placed on 10-day injured list with left knee sprain).

The Detroit Tigers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the charge at the plate. The Pittsburgh Pirates edged out the Chicago Cubs in a close matchup, securing a 4-3 victory. The Minnesota Twins secured a 7-4 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Joe Ryan earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

In roster movement, the Philadelphia Phillies acquired Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers for cash, while the St. Louis Cardinals traded LHP Nick Raquet to the Baltimore Orioles for 2B Brayden Smith.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall to Phillies in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies edged out the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-3, with Taijuan Walker earning the win after 5.0 IP, 6 K, 2 ER, and 2 BB. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 1 H, 1 HR, and 3 RBI.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Marlins 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the charge at the plate. Greene's impressive performance included 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs, while Casey Mize earned the win with 5.2 innings pitched, 5 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Pirates Pull Off Thrilling 4-3 Win Over Cubs**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates edged out the Chicago Cubs in a close matchup, securing a 4-3 victory. Braxton Ashcraft led the Pirates' pitching effort with 5.0 innings, 9 strikeouts, 1 earned run, and 1 walk.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 7-4**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured a 7-4 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Joe Ryan earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. Trevor Larnach led the Twins' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall to Orioles in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-2 victory over the San Francisco Giants, with Casey Schmitt and Taylor Ward contributing to the winning effort.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Edge Phillies in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow win over the Philadelphia Phillies, taking the game 4-3. Corbin Carroll and Jose Fernandez led the Diamondbacks' offense, while James McCann and Trea Turner contributed for the Phillies alongside Kyle Schwarber and Bryce Harper.

top_news.title: **O'Neill Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right fielder Tyler O'Neill has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion. The move is retroactive to April 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Phillies Acquire RF Steward Berroa in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have made a move to bolster their outfield, acquiring right fielder Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers in exchange for cash.
